title: FOIA US Navy records 4/20 Vietnam War

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for subject below;
Name: Harry Monahan
Branch: United States Navy
DOB: March 9, 1940
Dates of Service: Approx 1959 to 1979

passed away September 27, 2024

Request following documents:
1) hard copy of Bronze Star Medal award citation
2) History of Assignments NAVPERS form 601-5
3) Navy commendation medal award citation
5) Presidential Unit Citation on file
Historical Documentation, Vietnam War history

first name: Harry
last name: Monahan

I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information.
Please mail hardcopies to:
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115
or please email pdf copies to requests@muckrock.com

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Wisconsin Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to Wisconsin's Open Records Law, Wis. Stat. § 19.31 et seq., I am submitting a public records request for the following records related to the homicide investigation at 311 Williams Street, Avoca, Wisconsin on May 10, 2021, involving defendant Sean Pickett — State of Wisconsin v. Sean Pickett, Iowa County Circuit Court.
Specifically I am requesting:

All body worn camera footage recorded by Avoca Police Chief Dan Carey during his response to and first encounter with Sean Pickett on May 10, 2021 — this footage was admitted as a State's Rebuttal Exhibit during trial
All body worn camera footage recorded by any responding officer at the scene on May 10, 2021
All 911 call audio recordings related to this incident
All dispatch recordings related to this incident from May 10, 2021
All recorded interviews or statements made by Sean Pickett to law enforcement in connection with this case

The case is fully adjudicated. Sean Pickett was found guilty of first-degree intentional homicide and mistreatment of animals in July 2022 and sentenced to life in prison in September 2022. There are no pending proceedings. All exemptions related to active investigations or pending prosecutions are no longer applicable.
I am producing an educational documentary and request a fee waiver. If a fee waiver is not granted please provide a cost estimate before processing. I am prepared to pay reasonable costs and do not wish the fee question to delay or prevent fulfillment of this request.
If any portion of these records is withheld in whole or in part, please cite the specific statutory exemption that applies under Wis. Stat. § 19.35 or applicable law, and explain the specific reasoning behind each redaction or denial individually so that I may consider an appeal.
Please provide records via secure digital download where possible. Please confirm receipt of this request and your anticipated response date.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Christopher Nkemdirim
